Manufactured by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]],<ref name="DB" /> '''Obsidian 10''' was a [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/ln starfighter]] serving the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy's]] [[Obsidian Squadron/Legends|Obsidian Squadron]],<ref name="CCG1" /> which was [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] by [[OS-72-10]].<ref name="OScard" /> By [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">The ''[[Death Star II Limited]]'' set of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]] is set around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].</ref> Obsidian 10 was stationed aboard the<ref name="CCG1" /> [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]]<ref name="CSWE Thunderflare">{{CSWECite|III|242|''Thunderflare''}}</ref> ''[[Thunderflare]]'' and was further recalled to defend the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]] [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]] during its construction<ref name="CCG1" /> in the [[Endor system/Legends|Endor system]].<ref name="RotJ">{{Film|VI}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Obsidian 10 was created in [[1998]] for the flavor text of OS-72-10's card in the ''[[Special Edition Limited]]'' expansion set of [[Decipher]]'s [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="OScard" />
